summary: Tested Products Manager with image upload functionality. CRITICAL FIX APPLIED: Added 'Products' menu item to AdminDashboard.jsx and fixed product ID handling (id vs _id). All 9 backend tests pass. Frontend ProductsManager is now accessible and functional.

issues: Most products still have placeholder images - admin needs to update them via ProductsManager

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed ProductsManager.jsx to use 'product.id || product._id' instead of just 'product._id' for compatibility with API response format
Products menu item now correctly renders ProductsManager component in admin dashboard
seed_data_creation: Test products created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Products Manager is now fully functional. Admin can access it via 'Products' menu in sidebar. Image upload (both URL and file) works correctly. Product CRUD operations work. Homepage displays product images correctly.

details: Products menu item visible in admin sidebar
Clicking Products menu renders ProductsManager component
Add Product button visible and functional
Product created successfully with image URL
OR separator between URL and file upload options
Uploaded image URL returned and usable
Edit button opens dialog with current product data
Current Image preview shows existing image
Image fallback works for broken images
Accepts image files and returns URL
